---
title: "Metagame Differences between Professional and Amateur"
format: 
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

This projects aims to review online ranked matches and professional tiers of Counter-Strike gameplay. 

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Analysis Notebook
```{=html}
<iframe src="cs-coordination.html" width="100%" height="1000px" style="border: none; border-radius: 8px;"></iframe>
```

## Final Report (PDF)
<br>
The final written report summarizing the insights found in analyzing these skill ranges

<br>

[<i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf-fill"></i> Read the Full PDF Report](cs-coordination-report.pdf){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg target="_blank"}

:::
